touches.ai_summary: Amanda Flores submitted an inbound demo request via website form. Indicated interest in improving pipeline visibility for their sales team. Brief intake form completed.
next_steps: Rep to send calendar link for discovery call
Amanda to review product overview deck

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview and calendar booking link. Amanda responded confirming availability for discovery call next week and asked about pricing tiers.

questions_asked.question: What are your pricing tiers for a team of around 10 people?
questions_asked.answer: Rep provided high-level pricing range and mentioned custom packages based on automation needs

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday
Amanda to invite Casey Doyle to the call

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent pre-call email with discovery agenda and questions to prep Amanda. Amanda confirmed and mentioned they're currently evaluating Gong as well.

questions_asked.question: Will this integrate with our existing Salesforce setup?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed native Salesforce integration and shared case study

next_steps: Discovery call confirmed for tomorrow
Rep to prepare competitive comparison vs Gong

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Amanda Flores covered current pipeline challenges at CoreCloud. Team of 10 sales reps struggling with forecast accuracy and deal visibility. Currently using basic CRM reports, exploring Gong and our solution. Amanda is champion but noted VP Sales will need to approve budget.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a conversation intelligence solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda explained Q1 forecasts were off by 30%, need better visibility into deal health

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda mentioned Casey Doyle (Sales Manager) and noted VP Sales has final budget approval

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Gong's features?
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined differentiation in unlimited automation tier vs Gong's usage limits

objections: Amanda mentioned Gong is the frontrunner due to brand recognition
next_steps: Schedule technical eval for Amanda and Casey
Rep to send ROI calculator
Amanda to check VP Sales availability for future call

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Amanda walking through live demo focused on pipeline visibility dashboards and automated call summaries. Amanda engaged, tested integrations, asked detailed questions about reporting customization. Casey Doyle was invited but did not attend.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the risk signals to match our sales process stages?
questions_asked.answer: Rep demonstrated configuration options and offered custom field mapping

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained 2-3 week onboarding with dedicated CSM support

questions_asked.question: How are you currently tracking conversation data?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda explained manual note-taking in Salesforce, inconsistent across team

objections: Amanda concerned about user adoption given team's resistance to new tools in the past
next_steps: Rep to prepare proposal for 10 seats with unlimited automation
Amanda to sync with Casey and get his feedback
Schedule proposal review call

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Amanda. Presented $7,600 ACV for 10 seats with unlimited automation tier. Amanda reacted to pricing, mentioned Gong quote came in lower. Discussed ROI based on forecast accuracy improvements. Amanda requested discount to match Gong's pricing.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Gong's pricing? They quoted us about 30% less.
questions_asked.answer: Rep asked about Gong's feature set in their quote, mentioned flexibility on price with exec approval

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda said competitive pricing and getting VP Sales comfortable with the platform

objections: VP Sales not yet engaged or shown value
next_steps: Rep to work on revised pricing
Amanda to schedule call with VP Sales
Target decision by end of month

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled exec meeting with VP Sales was rescheduled by Amanda due to VP's calendar conflict. Brief check-in call with Amanda only. She confirmed still interested but noted budget approval moving slower than expected.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything blocking the VP Sales meeting from happening?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda said VP is slammed with board prep, should open up next week

next_steps: Reschedule exec meeting for next week
Rep to send one-pager for VP to review beforehand

touches.ai_summary: Exec meeting with Amanda, rep presented revised proposal with 28% discount to match competitive pressure from Gong. Amanda appreciated the movement on price. Discussed contract terms and implementation timeline. Amanda committed to getting VP Sales on next call to finalize.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a 6-month commitment instead of annual?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained discount pricing requires annual commitment, offered quarterly payment terms

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for going live with a solution?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda said ideally before end of Q2 to impact second half forecasting

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to add seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained pro-rated expansion pricing and seat scalability

objections: Annual commitment a concern given budget constraints
next_steps: Schedule final call with VP Sales for approval
Amanda to review MSA with their procurement
Target signature within 2 weeks

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up exec meeting rescheduled by Amanda again due to VP conflict. Call happened with Amanda only. She expressed continued interest but noted VP Sales has concerns about ROI timeline and wants to see more customer references. Amanda still advocating internally but momentum slowing.

questions_asked.question: Do you have references from marketing agencies our size who've seen forecast improvement?
questions_asked.answer: Rep offered to connect with two similar customers for reference calls

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else the VP needs to feel confident moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Amanda said VP wants proof of ROI and is comparing total cost vs Gong more carefully

questions_asked.question: What if we reduced to 8 seats to lower the initial investment?
questions_asked.answer: Rep ran revised numbers, offered slight additional discount for 8 seats

objections: VP Sales still not directly engaged
ROI timeline concerns compared to Gong
next_steps: Rep to arrange customer reference calls
Amanda to make one more push for VP meeting
Decision pushed to next month
